title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 12–12, this part focuses on Yamato as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It all started 13 years ago!! When we landed at the destination of the final log pose, where no one had ever reached before...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: A place called the LODESTAR ISLAND!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when we disembarked, giddy at what we might find...we realized that it was NOT the final island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The needles of the log pose went haywire, refusing to point out a new destination! But...

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 4 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
